exclude.Description: Binary flag indicating if the session was excluded from final analysis.

exclude_reason.Description: Reason for exclusion (e.g., high motion, fail preprocessing etc).

tsnr.Description: Temporal Signal-to-Noise Ratio extracted from specified ROIs (e.g., S1, striatum).

MFW_mean.Description: Mean Framewise Displacement (motion proxy) across the functional scan.

FC_Specific.Description: Specific functional connectivity metric derived from the seed-to-voxel validation analysis.

Specificity_Cat.Description: Categorical classification of the functional connectivity profile.
